dataHeroStaffArgumentation.title: IT Staff Augmentation
dataHeroStaffArgumentation.description: Strengthen your operations with our staff augmentation service designed based on experience, analysis,

infoStaffArgumentation.title: Slow processes due to lack of specialized technical resources
Difficulty covering critical or temporary roles
High recruitment and talent retention costs
Loss of strategic focus due to administrative tasks

titleStaffArgumentation1.title: The staffing model that combines talent, agility, and measurable results
titleStaffArgumentation1.description: <>Our specialized IT service is designed so you can access the profiles you need with efficiency and methodological support. We take care of the entire cycle: from talent identification and validation to their integration and continuous support in your operations.

titleStaffArgumentation2.title: When your team needs to grow, IT Staff Augmentation is the answer
titleStaffArgumentation2.description:
<>Companies need to scale with agility and precision, but traditional recruitment is often slow and costly. Our IT Staff Augmentation model allows you to strengthen your team without resorting to traditional outsourcing schemes.

Symptoms of management without efficient IT staffing:

titleStaffArgumentation3.title: Your strategic partner in Staff Augmentation
titleStaffArgumentation3.description:
<>Over four decades of experience back us as one of the most solid technological allies in Latin America. We not only offer talent but a collaboration model designed for continuity, efficiency, and quality.

Our differential

highlight.description: you incorporate specialized talent that works under your direction and processes, with selection, hiring, and administrative management support from Heinsohn.

metrics.description: 100% remote or hybrid depending on required location.

items.textos: Implementation of modern interfaces with React, Angular, Vue.js, and Next.js.
Construction of services and APIs with Java (Spring Boot), Node.js, Python (FastAPI/Django), and .NET Core.
Comprehensive implementation with stacks like MERN, MEAN, and Java + React/Angular combinations.
Native and hybrid mobile applications with Swift, Kotlin, React Native, and Flutter.
Design and execution of automated tests with Playwright, Cypress, Selenium, and Appium.
Construction of robust, scalable, and maintainable testing frameworks.
Functional, regression, performance (JMeter), and security testing.
Implementation and management in AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.
Orchestration and continuous deployment with Kubernetes, Terraform, Docker, and continuous integration.
Security embedded in development, access management, regulatory compliance, and penetration testing.
Definition of digital products and user-centric experiences with Figma and Adobe XD.
Project management using agile methodologies and collaborative frameworks.
Gathering, documentation, and validation of technical and functional requirements.
Design of data architectures and processing with Snowflake, Databricks, dbt, Apache Airflow, and Spark.
Solution development with language models, vector databases, and RAG architectures.
Construction, training, and deployment of models with MLOps, PyTorch, TensorFlow, and Scikit-learn.
Business intelligence and advanced analytics with Power BI and Tableau.
Definition of software, cloud, and data architectures for enterprise solutions.
Incorporation of technical leaders in strategic technology management roles.

infoStaffArgumentation4.title: Proximity and collaboration
infoStaffArgumentation4.description: Talent in your own time zone.

infoStaffArgumentation4.title: Full scalability:
infoStaffArgumentation4.description: Expand or shrink your team according to project demands.

infoStaffArgumentation5.title: Needs Assessment
infoStaffArgumentation5.description: We understand your context and required profiles.

infoStaffArgumentation5.title: Selection and validation
infoStaffArgumentation5.description: We pre-select and technically evaluate candidates.

infoStaffArgumentation5.title: Formalization
infoStaffArgumentation5.description: Transparent agreements and full support in hiring.

infoStaffArgumentation5.title: Execution
infoStaffArgumentation5.description: The team integrates into your operations with constant monitoring.

infoStaffArgumentation6.description: CMMI Level 5 certification and agile methodologies (Scrum, OKR, Lean).
Regional coverage with headquarters in LATAM and North America.
